title: Hut 8 Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2024 Results
text: Hut 8 Corp. 2024 Full Year Earnings Report. Full year 2024 revenue: $162.4 million (vs. $96.0 million in 2023). Net income: $331.4 million (vs. $21.9 million in 2023). Adjusted EBITDA: $555.7 million (vs. $85.7 million in 2023). Q4 2024 Results: Quarterly revenue $31.7 million (vs. $38.9 million in Q4 2023). Net income $152.0 million (vs. $10.6 million in Q4 2023). Adjusted EBITDA $310.6 million (vs. $48.6 million in Q4 2023). Energy capacity under management: 1,020 MW. Energy cost per MWh (Q4): $31.63 (30% decrease from Q4 2023). Bitcoin mined (full year): 1,466 BTC (vs. 2,789 BTC in 2023). Cost to mine Bitcoin: $27,959 annually (vs. $13,198 in 2023). Strategic Bitcoin reserve: 10,171 BTC. Market value of reserve (Dec 31): $949.5 million. Business segments: Power $56.6M, Digital Infrastructure $17.5M, Compute $80.7M, Other $7.6M. Development pipeline: 12,300 MW with 2,800 MW under exclusivity. Capital actions: $150M strategic investment from Coatue, converted $37.9M Anchorage Digital loan to equity, launched $500M ATM program, initiated $250M stock repurchase program.
